conversation.speaker: Employee
conversation.text: Of course! It's in aisle 7, on the middle shelf. We have a few different brands there.

conversation.speaker: Customer
conversation.text: Great, thanks. Also, are there any special offers on pasta or rice this week?

conversation.speaker: Employee
conversation.text: Yes, actually! The store-brand pasta is on a 'buy one, get one free' offer. It's in the same aisle.

conversation.speaker: Customer
conversation.text: Oh, that's a good deal. And what about fresh fruit? Any discounts?

conversation.speaker: Employee
conversation.text: The bananas and apples are on sale. They're at the front of the produce section with yellow price tags.

conversation.speaker: Customer
conversation.text: Perfect. I'll check those out. Thanks for your help!

conversation.speaker: Employee
conversation.text: You're welcome! Have a nice day.

questions.question: What specific pasta sauce is the customer looking for?
Where can the customer find the pasta sauce?
options: At the front of the store

questions.question: What is the special offer on the store-brand pasta?
options: Three for the price of two
